---
subparagraph: yes
execute:
  echo: false
geometry:
  - top=20mm
  - left=20mm
  - right=20mm
  - bottom=20mm
format:
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
        keep-tex: true
        keep-md: true
        pdf-engine: lualatex
author: Frederick Joseph Boehm, III
date: last-modified
phone: 715-252-3929
address: "University of Michigan · 419 Waymarket DR · Ann Arbor, Michigan 48103 · USA"
email: frederick.boehm@gmail.com
fontsize: 10pt
github: fboehm # github account
orcid: 0000-0002-1644-5931 # orcid identifier
#osf: ymqui # osf five character id
#twitter: twitter # twitter handle
web: fboehm.us
fontawesome: yes
validate-yaml: false
engine: jupyter
---

```{python} 
import yaml
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, display_latex
from datetime import datetime
```




# Updated  

# Education and Training  

\hrule

**University of Michigan** \hfill Ann Arbor, Michigan, USA  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Internal Medicine (NIH T32 training grant) \hfill 2023 to present  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics \hfill 2021 to 2023  

**University of Massachusetts Medical School** \hfill Worcester, Massachusetts, USA  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Microbiology & Physiological Systems \hfill 2019 to 2021  

**University of Wisconsin-Madison** \hfill Madison, Wisconsin, USA  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics and Medical Informatics \hfill 2019     
Ph.D., Department of Statistics \hfill 2011 to 2019  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Molecular and Environmental Toxicology Center \hfill 2012 to 2014  
Assistant Researcher, Value-Added Research Center \hfill 2011  


**University of Washington** \hfill Seattle, Washington, USA   
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics \hfill 2007 to 2009   

**University of Wisconsin-Madison** \hfill Madison, Wisconsin, USA  
M.D., School of Medicine and Public Health \hfill 2003 to 2007  
M.S., Department of Population Health Sciences \hfill 2003 to 2007  
B.S., with Honors in Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biochemistry \hfill 1996 to 2001  






# Written Works 

\hrule

## Submitted Manuscripts 


```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "manuscript"
```

{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}




## Journal Articles 


```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "article-journal"
```


{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}


## Edited Book  




```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "book"
```


{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}


## Book Chapters


```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "chapter"
```


{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}



## Software



```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "software"
```


{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}




## Conference Proceedings




```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "paper-conference"
```

{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}

## Ph.D. Thesis



```{python}
ref_type = "thesis"
```

{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}



## Other Publications




```{python}
# define ref_type to subset bib entries
ref_type = "other"
```


{{< include try-bib.qmd >}}



# Teaching Experience

\hrule

## Formal Courses

How to teach inclusively for educating a diverse nation  \hfill Spring 2017 & Fall 2017  
Role: Co-facilitator \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison & CIRTL Network    


Introductory statistics for biologists  \hfill Fall 2016   
Role: Instructor  \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  

Special Topics: Data Science  \hfill Fall 2016   
Roles: Guest lecturer on topic models; Teaching assistant \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  

Introductory statistics for engineers  \hfill Spring 2014, Fall 2014, Spring 2015, Summer 2015, Fall 2015, Spring 2016   
Role: Instructor \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  

Introduction to Biostatistics  \hfill Fall 2009 & Winter 2010   
Role: Teaching assistant \hfill University of Washington  

Introductory organic chemistry \hfill Fall 2001   
Role: Teaching assistant \hfill University of California, Berkeley  




## Short Courses & Workshops

Engaging students in the teaching of statistics \hfill March 2018 & July 2020   
Role: Instructor  \hfill CIRTL Network  


Data analysis with topic models for communications researchers \hfill July 2016 & October 2016  
Role: Instructor  \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  


Data Carpentry Workshop \hfill June 2017 & September 2018 (University of Wisconsin-Madison & Missouri S&T)    
Role: Instructor  \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison & Missouri S&T University  
Website: https://uw-madison-aci.github.io/2017-06-19-uwmadison-dc/ & https://yeemey.github.io/2018-09-15-und-mbdh/  

Topic modeling for non-statisticians \hfill October 2013   
Role: Instructor \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  

Statistical computing with R \hfill June 2012 & June 2013   
Role: Instructor \hfill University of Wisconsin-Madison  


## Training in Teaching  

```{python}

# Read YAML file
with open("data/teacher-training.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)
```

```{python}
for course in data['courses']:
    display(Markdown(f"{course['title']} \hfill {course['term']}   \n{course['institution']}   "))
```


# Mentoring Experience

\hrule


```{python} 

# Read YAML file
with open("data/mentoring.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)

# Select elements
first_person_name = data['people'][0]['name']
```





```{python}
for person in data['people']:
    display(Markdown(f"Research mentor to {person['name']}, {person['title']} \hfill {person['start']} to {person['end']}   \nProject: {person['project']}   \nNext position: {person['next_role']}"))
```




# Awards & Honors

\hrule

```{python}
# Read YAML file
with open("data/awards.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)
sorted_awards = sorted(data.get("awards", []), key=lambda x: x.get("year", 0), reverse=True)
markdown_output = ""
for award in sorted_awards:
    year = award.get("year")
    end_year = award.get("end_year")
    if end_year is not None:
        year = f"{year} to {end_year}"
    markdown_output += f"\\footnotesize {award['title']}, {award['institution']} \hfill {year}  \n"
display(Markdown(markdown_output))
```



# Presentations


\hrule

```{python}
# Read YAML file
with open("data/presentations.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)

sorted_presentations = sorted(data.get("presentations", []), key=lambda x: x.get("date"), reverse=True)

markdown_output_talks = ""
markdown_output_posters = ""

for presentation in sorted_presentations:
    foo = ""
    date_str = presentation.get("date")
    date_obj = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d")
    date_formatted = date_obj.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    url = presentation.get("url")
    if url is not None:
        foo = f"\\footnotesize [{presentation['title']}]({url}) \hfill {date_formatted}  \n{presentation['venue']} \hfill {presentation['location']}  \n"
    else:
        foo = f"\\footnotesize {presentation['title']} \hfill {date_formatted}  \n{presentation['venue']} \hfill {presentation['location']}  \n"
    if presentation.get("presentation_type") == "talk":
        markdown_output_talks += foo
    elif presentation.get("presentation_type") == "poster":
        markdown_output_posters += foo
```      
      


## Slide Presentations

```{python}
display(Markdown(markdown_output_talks))
```



## Poster Presentations

```{python}
display(Markdown(markdown_output_posters))
```



# Service


\hrule


```{python}
# Read YAML file
with open("data/service.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)
sorted_service = sorted(data.get("service", []), key=lambda x: max(x.get("date")), reverse=True)

markdown_output_university = ""
markdown_output_community = ""
markdown_output_professional = ""


for service in sorted_service:
    foo = ""
    # Accessing and formatting the dates as "Month Year"
    dates = service.get("date", [])
    formatted_dates = []
    for date_str in dates:
        date_obj = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m")
        formatted_date = date_obj.strftime("%B %Y")
        # handle end_date
        end_date_str =  service.get("end_date")
        if end_date_str is not None:
            end_date_obj = datetime.strptime(end_date_str, "%Y-%m")
            end_date_formatted = end_date_obj.strftime("%B %Y")
            formatted_date = f"{formatted_date} to {end_date_formatted}"
        # handle current values
        if service.get("current") == 'true':
            formatted_date = f"{formatted_date} to present"
        formatted_dates.append(formatted_date)

    fd = ", ".join(formatted_dates)
    
    # handle those entries with multiple orgs
    organizations = service.get("organization", [])
    org_output = ", ".join(organizations)
    # handle those entries with url values
    url = service.get("url")
    if url is not None:
        foo = f"\\footnotesize [{service['title']}]({url}), {org_output} \hfill {fd}  \n"
    else:
        foo = f"\\footnotesize {service['title']}, {org_output} \hfill {fd}  \n"
    if service.get("service_type") == "university":
        markdown_output_university += foo
    elif service.get("service_type") == "community":
        markdown_output_community += foo
    elif service.get("service_type") == "professional":
        markdown_output_professional += foo
```      
      



## University Service

```{python}
display(Markdown(markdown_output_university))
```



## Community Service

```{python}
display(Markdown(markdown_output_community))
```



## Professional Service

```{python}
display(Markdown(markdown_output_professional))
```
